Think 'gegenpressing' is new? Nah. Arrigo Sacchi's AC Milan in the 80s pioneered the real tactical revolution. Their suffocating high line and relentless zonal marking pressed opponents into oblivion, 10 yards from their own box. They didn't just win trophies; they CHANGED football forever. Modern pressing tactics? They owe EVERYTHING to those Rossoneri masters. Don't @ me.
